sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐξετάζω

- Transliteration: Exetazo

- Phonetic: ex-et-ad'-zo

- Definition:

1. to search out

a. to examine strictly, enquire

b. enquire of someone

- Origin: from G1537 and etazo (to examine)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and ἐτάζω etazō (to examine); to test thoroughly (by questions) that is ascertain or interrogate: - ask enquire search.
